label: GROVE trace control
interpretation: Trace-enabled control used for exact ablation deltas.

label: Best single-pass baseline
interpretation: Best single-pass baseline selected by identification F1.

label: Path 1 only
interpretation: Removes Path 2 verification from the trace-enabled pipeline.

label: Path 2 only
interpretation: Lower-bound Path 2-only alternative; retained hazards have all boxes stripped.

label: No reconciliation
interpretation: Replaces reconciliation with a simple union rule.

label: GroundingDINO only
interpretation: Keeps only hazards grounded by the primary GroundingDINO source.

label: GDINO + DETR/OpenCLIP stack
interpretation: Tests the grounding stack without final Path 2 reconciliation.

label: Qwen image-only, no grounding
interpretation: Uses cached image reasoning labels without grounding boxes.

label: Caption-only keyword proxy
interpretation: Deterministic caption-keyword proxy, not a rerun VLM.

label: Image-only reasoning
interpretation: Image-only reasoning path from cached trace fields.

label: No fallback, drop hazards
interpretation: Drops hazards that depended on fallback grounding.

label: No fallback, strip boxes
interpretation: Keeps fallback-dependent hazards but removes their boxes.

label: No Path 2 verification
interpretation: Uses Path 1 pre-verification hazards as final outputs.

label: No Path 2 stage correction
interpretation: Removes Path 2 category/stage correction while retaining detections.

label: Grounded final only
interpretation: Keeps final hazards only when a grounding box is present.
